sentences.arabic: أَقَامَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ مَهْرَجَانًا لِلْفُنُونِ وَالثَّقَافَةِ اسْتَمَرَّ ثَلَاثَةَ أَيَّامٍ.
sentences.translation: Grad je organizovao festival umjetnosti i kulture koji je trajao tri dana.
sentences.translationEn: The city held an arts and culture festival that lasted three days.

sentences.arabic: عَرَضَ الْفَنَّانُونَ لَوْحَاتِهِمْ وَأَعْمَالَهُمْ الْيَدَوِيَّةَ فِي سَاحَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Umjetnici su izlagali svoje slike i rukotvorine na gradskom trgu.
sentences.translationEn: Artists displayed their paintings and handmade works in the city square.

sentences.arabic: أَحْيَا الْمُوسِيقِيُّونَ حَفَلَاتٍ مَوْسِيقِيَّةً شَعْبِيَّةً كُلَّ مَسَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Muzičari su izvodili narodne koncerte svake večeri.
sentences.translationEn: Musicians performed folk concerts every evening.

sentences.arabic: حَضَرَ الْمَهْرَجَانَ آلَافٌ مِنَ الزُّوَّارِ مِنْ دَاخِلِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَخَارِجِهَا.
sentences.translation: Festival je posjetilo hiljade posjetilaca iz grada i okoline.
sentences.translationEn: Thousands of visitors attended the festival from inside the city and beyond.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ مُدِيرُ الْمَهْرَجَانِ إِنَّ الْهَدَفَ هُوَ تَشْجِيعُ الثَّقَافَةِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ وَدَعْمُ الْفَنَّانِينَ الشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor festivala rekao je da je cilj podsticanje lokalne kulture i podrška mladim umjetnicima.
sentences.translationEn: The festival director said that the goal is to promote local culture and support young artists.
